name: jh-ai-agent
description: J.H AI Agent — standalone Tauri-based AI agent server that backs the JH application family (JHEditor, JHER, JH Task Manager).

scripts.// tauri: Sets env vars inline so `npm run tauri build` works without going through build.ps1. PROTOC_INCLUDE points the build script for prost-based crates (lance-encoding, etc.) at the standard google/* protos we ship in .proto_include/. TMP/TEMP redirected to an ASCII project-local dir to avoid issues on Windows accounts with non-ASCII usernames (e.g. Japanese/Korean). The `if` is wrapped in parens because cmd otherwise scopes the rest of the `&&` chain INSIDE the `if` body — so when .tmp_build already exists, the whole chain (including `tauri`) would be silently skipped with exit 0. Windows-only syntax (uses `set`); Unix users invoke tauri-cli directly.
scripts.tauri: (if not exist .tmp_build mkdir .tmp_build) && set PROTOC_INCLUDE=%CD%\.proto_include&& set TMP=%CD%\.tmp_build&& set TEMP=%CD%\.tmp_build&& tauri
